summary: FPV drones from the "Sever" assault group destroyed Ukrainian 2S22 "Bogdan" self-propelled artillery units in the Sumy region, while Russian forces using the "Yolka" anti-drone system intercepted and kinetically destroyed a Ukrainian Air Force "Hornet" fixed-wing UAV, causing its warhead to detonate. The "Rubicon" Center reported 90 targets destroyed on April 9, 2026, including Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs and personnel, and a Lancet loitering munition struck an AFU armored vehicle after hitting an FPV drone's lens during an ambush attempt. Ukrainian forces countered with FPV strikes on Russian soldiers using motorcycles and those feigning surrender, while Russian electronic warfare efforts expanded antenna size to disrupt FPV control, and Ukrainian EW systems issued warnings like "I’m giving you 15 seconds to land the FPV drone."
